expectations.text: CLAUDE.md contains a new discipline block with numbered steps
expectations.evidence: CLAUDE.md contains '## Rename Discipline' with four numbered steps

expectations.text: Discipline block has a breadcrumb comment
expectations.evidence: No '<!-- managed by /foo -->' breadcrumb on the Rename Discipline section. Only the Self-Improvement section has a breadcrumb.

expectations.text: Discipline covers all three steps: consistency pass, NOTES.md update, stale reference check
expectations.evidence: Step 1: consistency pass, Step 3: NOTES.md update, Step 4: final stale reference check — all three covered (split across 4 steps with step 2 being 'update references')

expectations.text: FEEDBACK_FOO.md FOO_1 is marked resolved or cross-referenced
